title: This Website
description: Designed and shipped a personal site to showcase work, writing, and photography in one place.
Containerized the build and deployed with a repeatable pipeline for easy updates.

title: Langchain - Open Source Contribution
description: Extended parsing so more languages could be indexed for RAG-style workflows.
Collaborated via review feedback until the change landed in the main project.

title: Weast
description: Built a Discord bot used day-to-day by a mid-size community.
Experimented with different APIs and integrations to enhance the bot's functionality.

title: Scholarly
description: Prototype for scheduling live tutoring sessions with real-time-friendly flows.
Backed by a relational schema for users, bookings, and availability.

title: Urban Translate
description: Mobile app concept for turning informal slang into plain language.
Explored NLP-backed flows with a small Node API behind the client.

title: Promedio
description: Grade and GPA tracking for students who want a single place for progress.
CRUD-heavy UI with validation so term data does not get out of sync.

title: SpideyBot
description: Chat-style client experimenting with raw sockets over TCP and UDP.
Layered RSA ideas for toy end-to-end messaging between peers.

title: CartMax
description: Android grocery-ordering flow aimed at peak pandemic constraints.
Firebase for auth and data with Mockito-backed unit tests on core logic.
